channel.title: GitHub Julia Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: FluxML/Flux.jl
item.description: Relax! Flux is the ML library that doesn't make you tensor

item.title: JuliaManifolds/Manifolds.jl
item.description: Manifolds.jl provides a library of manifolds aiming for an easy-to-use and fast implementation.

item.title: gdalle/DifferentiationInterface.jl
item.description: An interface to various automatic differentiation backends in Julia.

item.title: JuliaEarth/CoordRefSystems.jl
item.description: Unitful coordinate reference systems for geographic maps in Julia

item.title: jump-dev/JuMP.jl
item.description: Modeling language for Mathematical Optimization (linear, mixed-integer, conic, semidefinite, nonlinear)

item.title: GenXProject/GenX.jl
item.description: GenX: a configurable power system capacity expansion model for studying low-carbon energy futures. More details at : https://genx.mit.edu

item.title: SciML/SciMLBase.jl
item.description: The Base interface of the SciML ecosystem

item.title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
item.description: ClimaAtmos.jl is a library for building atmospheric circulation models that is designed from the outset to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools. We welcome contributions!

item.title: bhftbootcamp/CryptoAPIs.jl
item.description: CryptoAPIs is a library written in Julia that combines API wrappers from various exchanges, simplifying access to market 💹 data

item.title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
item.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

item.title: JuliaPlots/Plots.jl
item.description: Powerful convenience for Julia visualizations and data analysis

item.title: SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
item.description: High performance ordinary differential equation (ODE) and differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers, including neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) and scientific machine learning (SciML)

item.title: GeoscienceAustralia/HiQGA.jl
item.description: High Quality Geophysical Analysis provides a general purpose Bayesian and deterministic inversion framework for various geophysical methods and spatially distributed / timeseries data

item.title: andreasKroepelin/polylux
item.description: A package for creating slides in Typst
